softWarnings: [library-bound-css] materials-program-nav-refined.html: Library-bound mode discourages custom CSS class definitions in <style> blocks (.status-pill, .is-primary, .is-neutral, .is-success, .is-warning, .toolbar-shell, .toolbar-chip, .is-active). Prefer Tailwind utilities plus Library brand CSS variables/component JSON instead.
